turns.reference_transcript: She had your dark suit in greasy wash water all year.
turns.orthographic_transcript: She had your dark suit in greasy wash water all year.
turns.phonetic_transcript: h# sh iy hv eh dcl jh axr dcl d aa r kcl k s ux tcl en gcl g r iy s iy w aa sh epi w ah dx axr aa l y ih axr h#
turns.raw_transcript: She had your dark suit in greasy wash water all year.

turns.reference_transcript: Don't ask me to carry an oily rag like that.
turns.orthographic_transcript: Don't ask me to carry an oily rag like that.
turns.phonetic_transcript: h# d ow n q ae s epi m iy tcl t ix kcl k ih r iy ix n q ao l iy r ae gcl g l ay tcl dh ae tcl t h#
turns.raw_transcript: Don't ask me to carry an oily rag like that.

turns.reference_transcript: Soon the office work claimed all her time.

turns.raw_transcript: Soon the office work claimed all her time.

turns.reference_transcript: Next, the hen was nested and all seemed well.

turns.reference_transcript: Heavy industry, slanted toward inexhaustible government coffers, attracted him.
